manchete: Cape Verde held Spain. The internet held its breath. And the number nobody expected arrived.
insights: Cape Verde's goalkeeper stopped Spain in a historic 0–0 — the debut of an entire country at the World Cup. The support of a nation that barely fit on the map exploded on social media, and the photo of the green crest became the most efficient post of the week: 61% engagement. No giant came close.

Edin Dzeko is 40 years old, survived a war, and captained Bosnia at the World Cup. The story went viral — and the national team responded on social media with a presence in the top engagement rankings for three consecutive days, including opening day. The dragon flies, and the fans fly with it.

Haiti took the field in a different shirt than they had planned to wear — FIFA ordered a change before their debut because the design resembled the Polish flag. The controversy made headlines worldwide. Senegal played none of that, but swept the reels rankings: the four most efficient video posts of the week were all from the Senegalese national team, with up to 20.2% VER.

Portugal had the most-watched reel of the week — 34 million views and over 3 million likes, superpower numbers. But dominating reach is different from dominating connection. While Portugal was the most watched, Cape Verde was the most felt.
contraste: Portugal broke viewing records — 34 million views on a single video, the biggest of the week. But the team that truly made fans tremble was an African archipelago in its first World Cup. Cape Verde with 61% ER is the weekly reminder that reach is fame, engagement is love.
pra_acompanhar: Bosnia face Switzerland — and Dzeko still has stories to tell on and off the pitch. If the narrative keeps growing, the engagement will follow. Keep an eye on it.
legenda: Portugal teve 34 milhões de views. Cabo Verde teve 61% de engajamento. Sabe qual número importa mais? Todo domingo a gente te manda a análise que o futebol mainstream não faz — link na bio pra assinar a newsletter. 📊🌍
assunto: Cabo Verde vs Portugal: quem engajou mais forte na Copa?
